title: Neural Genesis Hackathon
description: A 48-hour challenge to build agentic workflows that solve campus and societal coordination problems.

title: Transformer Architecture Breakdown
description: A deep dive from scratch: writing a self-attention head, key-value caches, and rotary embeddings in PyTorch.

title: AI in Production: Edge Deployment
description: Industry researchers demonstrate TensorRT compilation, quantization (INT4/INT8), and low-latency serving.

title: SDS Annual Research Symposium
description: Members showcase their semester research posters and peer-reviewed submissions in ML, CV, and NLP.
